scripts.setup: cd backend && pip install -r requirements.txt && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd .. && npm install
scripts.dev: start cmd /k "cd backend && fastapi dev app/main.py" && start cmd /k "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run test
scripts.lint: cd backend && python -m ruff check . --fix && python -m ruff format . && cd ../frontend && npm run format && npm run lint
scripts.test: cd backend && python -m pytest tests/ && cd ../frontend && npm test
scripts.clean: cd backend && rmdir /S /Q __pycache__ .pytest_cache .ruff_cache 2>nul || exit 0 && cd ../frontend && rmdir /S /Q node_modules dist coverage 2>nul || exit 0 && cd .. && rmdir /S /Q node_modules 2>nul || exit 0
